mod_assess.reason: No danger signs, no acute illness, MUAC green (>=125mm), no oedema: well child. Check vaccination status and provide general home care/prevention advice.

mod_danger_sign_check.reason: No danger signs detected. Child does not require urgent referral from this module. Proceed to condition-specific assessment modules (diarrhoea, fever, cough/fast breathing, malnutrition). Provide standard home care advice: more fluids, continue feeding, when to return (cannot drink or feed, becomes sicker, develops blood in stool), use bednet. Follow up in 3 days.

mod_check_vaccines.reason: No vaccine card present; advise caregiver to bring card to health facility to verify vaccination status and catch up on any missed vaccines.

mod_fever_malaria_treatment.reason: Fever <7 days but child is NOT in a malaria area: RDT and AL are not indicated. Provide home care advice and follow up in 3 days. Other modules will assess other causes of fever.

mod_home_care_advice.reason: Child assessed with no illness, no malnutrition, vaccinations current. Provide general preventive home care advice. No follow-up scheduled.

final_outcome.actions: adv_home_care_more_fluids; adv_home_care_continue_feeding; adv_home_care_when_to_return; adv_home_care_bednet; adv_vaccine_card_missing; adv_vaccines_due; adv_refer_for_vaccines; fu_vaccine_referral_advised; adv_home_care; adv_fluids_given; adv_feeding_given; adv_when_to_return_given

mod_assess.reason: No danger signs. No pneumonia. Uncomplicated diarrhoea (<14 days, no blood). Optionally co-existing uncomplicated fever in malaria area. Flag diarrhoea and conditionally fever treatment modules, home care, and vaccine check.

mod_danger_sign_check.reason: No danger signs detected. Child does not require urgent referral from this module. Proceed to condition-specific assessment modules (diarrhoea, fever, cough/fast breathing, malnutrition). Provide standard home care advice: more fluids, continue feeding, when to return (cannot drink or feed, becomes sicker, develops blood in stool), use bednet. Follow up in 3 days.

mod_check_vaccines.reason: No vaccine card present; advise caregiver to bring card to health facility to verify vaccination status and catch up on any missed vaccines.

mod_malnutrition_screening.reason: Child is outside the 6mo-5yr age range for MUAC-based malnutrition screening. Module marked done without malnutrition classification.

mod_home_care_advice.reason: Child assessed with no illness, no malnutrition, vaccinations current. Provide general preventive home care advice. No follow-up scheduled.
